metadata.name: Substitute Item in a BOPIS Order

description: While picking a 'Buy Online, Pick up In Store' grocery order, an associate finds an item is out of stock and needs to substitute it.

nodes.task_description: The associate marks the original item as 'out of stock' in their picking application.

expected_outcome.expected: The system is aware the item cannot be fulfilled as ordered.

nodes.task_description: The application suggests an approved substitute item based on pre-defined rules.

expected_outcome.expected: A suitable replacement item is suggested to the associate.

nodes.task_description: The associate picks the substitute item and the system notifies the customer of the substitution.

expected_outcome.expected: The order is completed with a substitution, and the customer is informed of the change.
